project_understanding.project_summary: This project is a personal portfolio displaying projects and skills.
project_understanding.architecture: Node.js backend with MongoDB database, no frontend included.

diagrams.name: System Overview
diagrams.mermaid:
graph TD
Project --> Backend
Backend --> Database
Database --> Storage
Frontend --> UI
UI --> Project

diagrams.name: Request Flow
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart TD
A[User Request] -->|HTTP| B[API Gateway]
B -->|Authentication| C[Auth Service]
C -->|Validation| D[Business Logic]
D -->|Data Retrieval| E[Database]
E --> F[Response]

diagrams.name: Portfolio API Sequence
diagrams.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
User --> Request: Get Portfolio
Request --> API Gateway
API Gateway --> Controller
Controller --> Service
Service --> Database
Database --> Response
